skinparam classHeaderBorderLineColor #CCCCCC

skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientColor2 #E8E8E8

skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientType linear
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientDirection horizontal
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientStart 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientEnd 1
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientSteps 10
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientRepeat 1
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientMirror 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientReflect 0

skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientRotate 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientScale 1

skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientTranslateY 0

skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientSkewY 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientOriginX 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientOriginY 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientClipPath 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientMask 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientFilter 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientBlendMode normal
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientCompositeSourceOver
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientIsolation auto
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientMixBlendMode normal
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientBackgroundBlendMode normal
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientForegroundBlendMode normal
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientOverlayBlendMode normal
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientMultiplyBlendMode multiply
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientScreenBlendMode screen
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientOverlayBlendMode overlay
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientDarkenBlendMode darken
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientLightenBlendMode lighten
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientColorDodgeBlendMode color-dodge
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientColorBurnBlendMode color-burn
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientHardLightBlendMode hard-light
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientSoftLightBlendMode soft-light
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientDifferenceBlendMode difference
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientExclusionBlendMode exclusion
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientHueBlendMode hue
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientSaturationBlendMode saturation
skinparam classHeaderBorderGradientColorBlendMode color

class TeleAlgo {
    -abonoMensual : float
    -llamadas : Llamada
    -tarifaInternacional : float
    +conAbonoMensual(abono : float)
    -abonoMensual(unAbono : Float)
    -aplicarTarifaPorMinutoALlamadaInternacional(tarifa : float)
    -calcularGastoFinal() : float
    -consultarPorLlamadaEfectuadaMasCostosa() : str
    -registrarLlamadaNacional(duracion : int, horario : int)
    -registrarLlamadaInternacional(duracion : int, horario : int, destino : str)
}

class Llamada {
    #duracion: int
    #horario: int
    #tarifa : Tarifa
    +costoTotal() : float
    +descripcion() : str
    #duracion(unaDuracion : int)
    #esDeLargaDuracion() : bool
    #horario(horario : int)
    #montoDescuento(montoBruto : float) : float
    #tarifa(tarifa : float)
}

class Tarifa {
    -monto : float
    +conMontoEnBaseAHorario(horario : int)
    +conMontoFijo(monto : int)
    -monto() : float
    -monto(monto : float)
}

class LlamadaNacional {
    +conDuracionYHorario(duracion : int, horario : int)
    +descripcion() : str
}

class LlamadaInternacional {
    -destino : str
    +conDuracionHorarioTarifaYDestino(duracion : int, horario : int, tarifa : float, destino: str)
    +descripcion() : str
    -destino(destino : str)
}

TeleAlgo "1" *-- "*" Llamada
Llamada "1" *-- "1" Tarifa
Llamada <|-- LlamadaNacional
Llamada <|-- LlamadaInternacional

note top of TeleAlgo as C
end note

note top of Llamada as A
end note

note top of Tarifa as C
end note

note top of LlamadaNacional as C
end note

note top of LlamadaInternacional as C
end note

@enduml
